en: TO THE CHOIRMASTER: WITH STRINGED INSTRUMENTS. A PSALM OF ASAPH. A SONG. In Judah God is known; his name is great in Israel.
zh: 在猶大， 神是人人所認識的， 在以色列，他的名被尊為大。

en: His abode has been established in Salem, his dwelling place in Zion.
zh: 他的帳棚是在撒冷， 他的居所是在錫安。

en: There he broke the flashing arrows, the shield, the sword, and the weapons of war. Selah
zh: 在那裡他折斷了弓上的火箭， 拆毀了盾牌、刀劍和爭戰的兵器。

en: Glorious are you, more majestic than the mountains of prey.
zh: 你滿有光華和榮美， 勝過獵物豐富的群山。

en: The stouthearted were stripped of their spoil; they sank into sleep; all the men of war were unable to use their hands.
zh: 心裡勇敢的人都被搶掠， 他們長睡不起； 所有大能的勇士都無力舉手。

en: At your rebuke, O God of Jacob, both rider and horse lay stunned.
zh: 雅各的 神啊！因你的斥責，坐車的和騎馬的都沉睡了。

en: But you, you are to be feared! Who can stand before you when once your anger is roused?
zh: 唯有你是可畏的， 你的烈怒一發出，誰能在你面前站立得住呢？

en: From the heavens you uttered judgment; the earth feared and was still,
zh: 神啊！你起來施行審判， 要拯救地上所有困苦的人。 那時，你從天上宣告審判， 地上的人就懼怕，並且靜默無聲。

en: when God arose to establish judgment, to save all the humble of the earth. Selah
Surely the wrath of man shall praise you; the remnant of wrath you will put on like a belt.
zh: 人的忿怒必使你得稱讚， 人的餘怒必成為你的裝飾。

en: Make your vows to the LORD your God and perform them; let all around him bring gifts to him who is to be feared,
zh: 你們許願，總要向耶和華你們的 神償還； 所有在他周圍的人，都要把貢物帶來獻給那可敬畏的 神。

en: who cuts off the spirit of princes, who is to be feared by the kings of the earth.
zh: 他必挫折眾領袖的傲氣， 他必使地上的君王畏懼他。
